name: agent-deploy
description: Manifest-driven, adapter-based installer for distributing AI coding agent configs across tools (internal reference skeleton).

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-manifests.js && node scripts/check-rule-drift.js && node scripts/check-entry-parity.js && node scripts/check-asset-schema.js && node scripts/check-catalog-parity.js && node scripts/check-unicode-safety.js && node scripts/check-secret-scan.js && node scripts/check-mcp-governance.js
